name: Nutrition Coaching Ontology (NUT-ONT)
description: Models nutrition coaching workflows: recipes, meal plans, client profiles, dietary constraints, allergen management, macro targeting, theme-driven curation, and coaching protocols. Designed for B2C nutrition platforms with Schema.org dual-typing. Part of PE-Series process engineering.
oaa:domain: Nutrition Coaching / Meal Plan Generation / Dietary Management

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Client-to-Plan Traversal
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Walk the full nutrition chain from client profile through macro targets, meal plan, daily structure, individual meals, and recipes
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: nut:Client -> hasProfile -> nut:HealthProfile; nut:Client -> hasMacroTarget -> nut:MacroTarget; nut:Client -> assignedToClient (inverse) <- nut:MealPlan -> containsMealPlanDay -> nut:MealPlanDay -> containsMeal -> nut:Meal -> containsRecipe -> nut:Recipe
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Trace the complete nutrition journey for a client from their health profile through to the recipes they eat

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Recipe Constraint Resolution
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Resolve whether a recipe is safe and suitable for a client by intersecting recipe diet/allergen tags with client constraints
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: nut:Recipe -> suitableForDietType -> nut:DietType; nut:Recipe -> excludesAllergen -> nut:Allergen; INTERSECT WITH nut:Client -> followsDiet -> nut:DietType; nut:Client -> hasAllergen -> nut:Allergen
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Answer 'is this recipe safe for this client?' by checking allergen exclusions and diet compatibility

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Theme-Driven Curation
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Navigate from meal themes through their goal alignment to matching client profiles, and from themes to their curated recipe collections
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: nut:MealTheme -> targetsGoal -> nut:Goal <- hasGoal <- nut:Client; nut:MealTheme <- belongsToTheme <- nut:Recipe
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Given a client's goal, discover which themes align and which recipes belong to those themes

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Macro Target Tracking
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Track macro compliance from daily totals through weekly aggregation to variance calculation against targets
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: nut:MacroTarget -> (target values); nut:MealPlanDay -> hasDailyTotals -> nut:DailyTotals -> (actual values); nut:MealPlan -> hasWeeklyTotals -> nut:WeeklyTotals -> (averaged values); variance = |actual - target| / target
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Calculate daily and weekly macro variance against client targets for coaching dashboards

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Shopping List Generation
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Aggregate all ingredients across a meal plan into a consolidated shopping list grouped by supermarket aisle
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: nut:MealPlan -> containsMealPlanDay -> nut:MealPlanDay -> containsMeal -> nut:Meal -> containsRecipe -> nut:Recipe -> containsIngredient -> nut:Ingredient -> (aggregate by aisle) -> nut:ShoppingList
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Generate a consolidated, aisle-grouped shopping list for a 7-day meal plan with UK availability checking

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Coach Workflow
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Coach management workflow from client caseload through plan approval to protocol authoring
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: nut:Coach -> manages -> nut:Client; nut:Coach -> approvedByCoach (inverse) <- nut:MealPlan; nut:Coach -> authors -> nut:Protocol
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: View a coach's caseload, pending plans for approval, and authored protocols

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Client Value Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Cross-ontology bridge from client goals to VP-ONT benefits for value proposition alignment
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Map nutrition coaching outcomes to measurable customer benefits for value proposition reporting

entities.name: Recipe
entities.description: A nutritionally-profiled recipe in the platform database. Schema.org Recipe compliant with clinical nutrition extensions. Hub entity for the recipe subgraph connecting ingredients, nutrition, instructions, diet suitability, and allergen exclusions.

oaa:properties.name: recipeId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this recipe

oaa:properties.name: name
oaa:properties.description: Human-readable recipe name

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Short description of the recipe and its nutritional highlights

oaa:properties.name: prepTime
oaa:properties.description: Preparation time in ISO 8601 duration format (e.g. PT15M)

oaa:properties.name: cookTime
oaa:properties.description: Cooking time in ISO 8601 duration format (e.g. PT30M)

oaa:properties.name: totalTime
oaa:properties.description: Total time including prep and cook in ISO 8601 duration format

oaa:properties.name: recipeYield
oaa:properties.description: Number of servings or portions (e.g. 4 servings)

oaa:properties.name: recipeCategory
oaa:properties.description: Primary meal category for this recipe

oaa:properties.name: recipeCuisine
oaa:properties.description: Cuisine classification (e.g. British, Mediterranean, Asian, Middle Eastern)

oaa:properties.name: difficulty
oaa:properties.description: Cooking difficulty level

oaa:properties.name: ukAvailable
oaa:properties.description: Whether all ingredients are readily available in UK supermarkets

oaa:properties.name: costPerServing
oaa:properties.description: Estimated cost per serving in GBP (e.g. GBP 2.50)

oaa:properties.name: seasonal
oaa:properties.description: Whether this recipe uses seasonal ingredients with peak availability windows

oaa:properties.name: seasonalMonths
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated month numbers (1-12) when seasonal ingredients peak

oaa:properties.name: keywords
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated keywords for search and theme matching

entities.name: Ingredient
entities.description: A food ingredient with UK availability, allergen classification, and nutritional contribution. Used in recipes and aggregated into shopping lists.

oaa:properties.name: ingredientId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this ingredient

oaa:properties.name: name
oaa:properties.description: Ingredient name (e.g. chicken breast, brown rice, olive oil)

oaa:properties.name: quantity
oaa:properties.description: Amount required with unit (e.g. 200g, 2 tbsp, 1 medium)

oaa:properties.name: category
oaa:properties.description: Macro food group category

oaa:properties.name: supermarketAisle
oaa:properties.description: UK supermarket aisle grouping for shopping list generation

oaa:properties.name: ukAvailable
oaa:properties.description: Whether this ingredient is available in UK supermarkets

oaa:properties.name: containsAllergen
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated allergen names from UK 14 major allergens if applicable

oaa:properties.name: caloriesPer100g
oaa:properties.description: Energy content per 100g in kcal

entities.name: NutritionProfile
entities.description: Macro and micronutrient breakdown per serving for a recipe. Schema.org NutritionInformation compliant.

oaa:properties.name: calories
oaa:properties.description: Energy content per serving in kcal

oaa:properties.name: proteinContent
oaa:properties.description: Protein per serving in grams

oaa:properties.name: carbohydrateContent
oaa:properties.description: Carbohydrates per serving in grams

oaa:properties.name: fatContent
oaa:properties.description: Total fat per serving in grams

oaa:properties.name: fiberContent
oaa:properties.description: Dietary fibre per serving in grams

oaa:properties.name: sugarContent
oaa:properties.description: Total sugars per serving in grams

oaa:properties.name: sodiumContent
oaa:properties.description: Sodium per serving in milligrams

oaa:properties.name: saturatedFatContent
oaa:properties.description: Saturated fat per serving in grams

oaa:properties.name: servingSize
oaa:properties.description: Serving size description (e.g. 1 portion, 350g)

entities.name: Instruction
entities.description: A single step in a recipe's preparation method. Ordered sequence of cooking instructions.

oaa:properties.name: stepNumber
oaa:properties.description: Sequential step number within the recipe

oaa:properties.name: text
oaa:properties.description: Instruction text describing the cooking action

oaa:properties.name: duration
oaa:properties.description: Time for this step in ISO 8601 duration format

oaa:properties.name: tip
oaa:properties.description: Optional coaching tip or technique note

entities.name: Substitution
entities.description: An alternative ingredient for dietary restriction or allergen avoidance. Links an original ingredient to its replacement with reason and nutritional impact.

oaa:properties.name: substitutionId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this substitution

oaa:properties.name: originalIngredient
oaa:properties.description: Name of the ingredient being substituted

oaa:properties.name: replacementIngredient
oaa:properties.description: Name of the substitute ingredient

oaa:properties.name: reason
oaa:properties.description: Reason for the substitution

oaa:properties.name: nutritionalImpact
oaa:properties.description: Description of how the substitution affects the nutrition profile

oaa:properties.name: ratioAdjustment
oaa:properties.description: Quantity adjustment ratio (e.g. 1:1, 1:0.75)

entities.name: MealPlan
entities.description: A structured meal plan generated for a specific client, aligned to their goals, dietary restrictions, and preferred themes. Typically 7 days. The top-level container for the meal planning subgraph.

oaa:properties.name: planId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this meal plan

oaa:properties.name: name
oaa:properties.description: Human-readable plan name (e.g. Week 12 - High Protein Mediterranean)

oaa:properties.name: dateCreated
oaa:properties.description: Date the plan was generated

oaa:properties.name: startDate
oaa:properties.description: First day of the meal plan

oaa:properties.name: endDate
oaa:properties.description: Last day of the meal plan

oaa:properties.name: planStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current lifecycle status of the plan

oaa:properties.name: durationDays
oaa:properties.description: Number of days in the plan (typically 7)

oaa:properties.name: assignedToClient
oaa:properties.description: Reference to the client this plan is generated for

oaa:properties.name: approvedByCoach
oaa:properties.description: Reference to the coach who approved this plan

oaa:properties.name: approvalDate
oaa:properties.description: Date the coach approved the plan

oaa:properties.name: coachNotes
oaa:properties.description: Coach annotations or adjustments to the AI-generated plan

entities.name: MealPlanDay
entities.description: A single day within a meal plan containing breakfast, lunch, dinner, and optional snacks with their associated recipes and nutrition totals.

oaa:properties.name: dayNumber
oaa:properties.description: Day number within the plan (1-7 for a weekly plan)

oaa:properties.name: date
oaa:properties.description: Calendar date for this plan day

oaa:properties.name: dayOfWeek
oaa:properties.description: Day of the week

entities.name: Meal
entities.description: A single meal slot (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack) within a plan day, referencing a specific recipe and serving size.

oaa:properties.name: mealSlot
oaa:properties.description: Which meal slot this occupies

oaa:properties.name: servings
oaa:properties.description: Number of servings of the referenced recipe

oaa:properties.name: portionAdjustment
oaa:properties.description: Any portion adjustment notes from the coach

entities.name: MealType
entities.description: Classification of meal slots: breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack. Defines timing and typical macro distribution.

oaa:properties.name: typeName
oaa:properties.description: Name of the meal type

oaa:properties.name: typicalTimeWindow
oaa:properties.description: Typical time window (e.g. 07:00-09:00)

oaa:properties.name: calorieSharePercent
oaa:properties.description: Typical percentage of daily calories allocated to this meal type

entities.name: DailyTotals
entities.description: Aggregated nutrition totals for a single plan day. Compared against client MacroTarget for variance tracking.

oaa:properties.name: totalCalories
oaa:properties.description: Total calories for the day in kcal

oaa:properties.name: totalProteinG
oaa:properties.description: Total protein for the day in grams

oaa:properties.name: totalCarbsG
oaa:properties.description: Total carbohydrates for the day in grams

oaa:properties.name: totalFatG
oaa:properties.description: Total fat for the day in grams

oaa:properties.name: totalFiberG
oaa:properties.description: Total dietary fibre for the day in grams

oaa:properties.name: calorieVariancePercent
oaa:properties.description: Percentage variance from MacroTarget dailyCalories

oaa:properties.name: proteinVariancePercent
oaa:properties.description: Percentage variance from MacroTarget proteinGrams

entities.name: WeeklyTotals
entities.description: Aggregated nutrition totals for the full meal plan period (typically 7 days). Averaged for weekly variance calculation.

oaa:properties.name: avgDailyCalories
oaa:properties.description: Average daily calories across the plan period

oaa:properties.name: avgDailyProteinG
oaa:properties.description: Average daily protein in grams

oaa:properties.name: avgDailyCarbsG
oaa:properties.description: Average daily carbohydrates in grams

oaa:properties.name: avgDailyFatG
oaa:properties.description: Average daily fat in grams

oaa:properties.name: weeklyCalorieVariancePercent
oaa:properties.description: Weekly average calorie variance from MacroTarget

oaa:properties.name: uniqueRecipeCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of distinct recipes used in the plan (variety metric)

oaa:properties.name: uniqueProteinSourceCount
oaa:properties.description: Number of distinct protein sources used (variety metric)

entities.name: ShoppingList
entities.description: Consolidated ingredient list for a meal plan, aggregated across all recipes, grouped by supermarket aisle, with UK availability checking.

oaa:properties.name: listId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this shopping list

oaa:properties.name: generatedDate
oaa:properties.description: Date the shopping list was generated

oaa:properties.name: totalItems
oaa:properties.description: Total number of unique items on the list

oaa:properties.name: estimatedTotalCost
oaa:properties.description: Estimated total cost in GBP

oaa:properties.name: allUKAvailable
oaa:properties.description: Whether all items are available in UK supermarkets

entities.name: MealPrepGuide
entities.description: Batch cooking and prep instructions to minimise daily effort. Generated from the meal plan's recipe set with shared prep steps consolidated.

oaa:properties.name: guideId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this prep guide

oaa:properties.name: prepDay
oaa:properties.description: Recommended prep day (e.g. Sunday, Wednesday)

oaa:properties.name: totalPrepTime
oaa:properties.description: Total batch prep time in ISO 8601 duration format

oaa:properties.name: storageInstructions
oaa:properties.description: How to store prepped items (fridge days, freezer suitability)

oaa:properties.name: coversDays
oaa:properties.description: Number of plan days covered by this prep session

entities.name: PlanStatus
entities.description: Lifecycle state of a meal plan with transition rules. Plans move through: pending -> approved -> active -> completed -> archived.

oaa:properties.name: statusName
oaa:properties.description: Name of the plan status

oaa:properties.name: transitionsTo
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated list of valid next statuses

oaa:properties.name: requiresCoachAction
oaa:properties.description: Whether transitioning from this status requires coach involvement

entities.name: Client
entities.description: An individual receiving nutrition coaching. Schema.org Patient compliant with clinical nutrition extensions. Hub entity connecting health profile, goals, dietary constraints, allergens, meal plans, and coaching relationship.

oaa:properties.name: clientId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this client

oaa:properties.name: name
oaa:properties.description: Client full name

oaa:properties.name: email
oaa:properties.description: Client email address

oaa:properties.name: age
oaa:properties.description: Client age in years

oaa:properties.name: gender
oaa:properties.description: Client gender for TDEE and macro calculation

oaa:properties.name: heightCm
oaa:properties.description: Height in centimetres

oaa:properties.name: weightKg
oaa:properties.description: Weight in kilograms

oaa:properties.name: bmi
oaa:properties.description: Body mass index (calculated: weightKg / (heightCm/100)^2)

oaa:properties.name: activityLevel
oaa:properties.description: Physical activity level for TDEE calculation

oaa:properties.name: registrationDate
oaa:properties.description: Date the client registered on the platform

oaa:properties.name: clientStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current client account status

entities.name: HealthProfile
entities.description: Client health data including biometrics, medical conditions, allergens, and dietary restrictions. Updated by the client and validated by the coach.

oaa:properties.name: profileId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this health profile

oaa:properties.name: lastUpdated
oaa:properties.description: Date the profile was last updated

oaa:properties.name: bloodPressure
oaa:properties.description: Blood pressure reading (e.g. 120/80)

oaa:properties.name: restingHeartRate
oaa:properties.description: Resting heart rate in BPM

oaa:properties.name: bodyFatPercent
oaa:properties.description: Body fat percentage if measured

oaa:properties.name: waistCircumferenceCm
oaa:properties.description: Waist circumference in centimetres

oaa:properties.name: medications
oaa:properties.description: Current medications that may affect nutrition planning

oaa:properties.name: coachValidated
oaa:properties.description: Whether a coach has reviewed and validated this profile

entities.name: Goal
entities.description: A nutrition or fitness goal that drives meal plan generation, theme selection, and macro target calculation.

oaa:properties.name: goalId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this goal

oaa:properties.name: goalType
oaa:properties.description: Classification of the nutrition goal

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Detailed description of the goal and approach

oaa:properties.name: targetDate
oaa:properties.description: Target date for achieving this goal

oaa:properties.name: defaultMacroSplit
oaa:properties.description: Default macro split for this goal type (e.g. protein:30%/carbs:35%/fats:35%)

oaa:properties.name: calorieAdjustment
oaa:properties.description: Calorie adjustment from TDEE (e.g. -500kcal for weight loss, +300kcal for muscle gain)

entities.name: MacroTarget
entities.description: Daily macronutrient targets set by the coach or calculated from the client's goal, TDEE, and activity level. The benchmark against which meal plan totals are measured.

oaa:properties.name: targetId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this macro target

oaa:properties.name: dailyCalories
oaa:properties.description: Target daily calorie intake in kcal

oaa:properties.name: proteinGrams
oaa:properties.description: Target daily protein in grams

oaa:properties.name: carbsGrams
oaa:properties.description: Target daily carbohydrates in grams

oaa:properties.name: fatGrams
oaa:properties.description: Target daily fat in grams

oaa:properties.name: fiberGrams
oaa:properties.description: Target daily fibre in grams

oaa:properties.name: effectiveDate
oaa:properties.description: Date these targets became effective

oaa:properties.name: setByCoach
oaa:properties.description: Whether these targets were manually set by a coach (true) or auto-calculated (false)

entities.name: DietaryRestriction
entities.description: A dietary constraint applied to a client, referencing a specific DietType. Tracks the reason and severity of the restriction.

oaa:properties.name: restrictionId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this restriction

oaa:properties.name: restrictionReason
oaa:properties.description: Reason for the dietary restriction

oaa:properties.name: severity
oaa:properties.description: How strictly the restriction must be enforced

oaa:properties.name: notes
oaa:properties.description: Additional notes from coach or client

entities.name: Allergen
entities.description: A food allergen from the UK 14 major allergens (Food Information Regulations 2014). Used for recipe safety checking and client constraint matching.

oaa:properties.name: allergenId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this allergen

oaa:properties.name: allergenName
oaa:properties.description: Name of the allergen per UK 14 major allergen list

oaa:properties.name: severity
oaa:properties.description: Severity of the client's reaction to this allergen

oaa:properties.name: diagnosed
oaa:properties.description: Whether the allergy has been clinically diagnosed

entities.name: MedicalCondition
entities.description: A diagnosed medical condition affecting nutrition planning. Includes ICD-10 coding for clinical interoperability.

oaa:properties.name: conditionId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this condition record

oaa:properties.name: conditionName
oaa:properties.description: Name of the medical condition (e.g. Type 2 Diabetes, PCOS, IBS)

oaa:properties.name: icd10Code
oaa:properties.description: ICD-10 code for clinical classification (e.g. E11 for Type 2 Diabetes)

oaa:properties.name: diagnosedDate
oaa:properties.description: Date of diagnosis

oaa:properties.name: managedByDiet
oaa:properties.description: Whether this condition is partially or fully managed through dietary intervention

oaa:properties.name: nutritionImplications
oaa:properties.description: How this condition affects nutrition planning (e.g. low GI for diabetes, low FODMAP for IBS)

entities.name: ProgressLog
entities.description: Daily or periodic tracking of client progress: weight, adherence, energy, and qualitative notes. Feeds into KPI measurement for coaching effectiveness.

oaa:properties.name: logId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this log entry

oaa:properties.name: logDate
oaa:properties.description: Date of the log entry

oaa:properties.name: weightKg
oaa:properties.description: Client weight on this date in kilograms

oaa:properties.name: adherenceScore
oaa:properties.description: Meal plan adherence score 0-100%

oaa:properties.name: energyLevel
oaa:properties.description: Self-reported energy level

oaa:properties.name: moodRating
oaa:properties.description: Self-reported mood rating 1-10

oaa:properties.name: notes
oaa:properties.description: Free-text notes from client or coach

entities.name: DietType
entities.description: A named dietary pattern or restriction. Covers ethical, religious, medical, macronutrient, and lifestyle diets. Schema.org RestrictedDiet compliant.

oaa:properties.name: dietId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this diet type

oaa:properties.name: dietName
oaa:properties.description: Name of the diet (e.g. Vegetarian, Keto, Halal, Low-FODMAP)

oaa:properties.name: category
oaa:properties.description: Diet motivation category

oaa:properties.name: schemaOrgUri
oaa:properties.description: Schema.org RestrictedDiet URI if one exists (e.g. https://schema.org/VeganDiet)

oaa:properties.name: exclusions
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated list of excluded food categories

oaa:properties.name: requiresCertification
oaa:properties.description: Whether ingredients require certification (e.g. Halal, Kosher)

entities.name: EthicalDiet
entities.description: Diets motivated by animal welfare or environmental ethics (e.g. Vegetarian, Vegan, Pescatarian, Flexitarian, Plant-Based).

oaa:properties.name: ethicalMotivation
oaa:properties.description: Primary ethical motivation for this diet

entities.name: ReligiousDiet
entities.description: Diets governed by religious dietary law (e.g. Halal, Kosher, Hindu Vegetarian, Jain).

oaa:properties.name: religion
oaa:properties.description: Religion associated with this dietary law

oaa:properties.name: certificationBody
oaa:properties.description: Certification authority for compliance verification

entities.name: MedicalDiet
entities.description: Diets prescribed or recommended for medical conditions (e.g. Diabetic, Low-FODMAP, Anti-Inflammatory, Renal, Low-Sodium).

oaa:properties.name: targetCondition
oaa:properties.description: Medical condition this diet addresses

oaa:properties.name: evidenceBase
oaa:properties.description: Clinical evidence supporting this dietary approach

entities.name: MacroDiet
entities.description: Diets defined by macronutrient ratios (e.g. Keto, Low Carb, High Protein, Low Fat, Carnivore).

oaa:properties.name: proteinPercent
oaa:properties.description: Target protein percentage of total calories

oaa:properties.name: carbsPercent
oaa:properties.description: Target carbohydrate percentage of total calories

oaa:properties.name: fatPercent
oaa:properties.description: Target fat percentage of total calories

entities.name: LifestyleDiet
entities.description: Diets adopted as a lifestyle philosophy rather than strict medical or ethical requirement (e.g. Mediterranean, Paleo, Whole30, Intermittent Fasting, Raw Food).

oaa:properties.name: durationBased
oaa:properties.description: Whether this diet is intended as a time-limited protocol (e.g. Whole30)

oaa:properties.name: typicalDurationDays
oaa:properties.description: Typical duration if time-limited

entities.name: AllergenFreeDiet
entities.description: Diets that exclude specific allergens (e.g. Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free, Egg-Free, Nut-Free, Soya-Free, Shellfish-Free).

oaa:properties.name: relatedAllergen
oaa:properties.description: The UK 14 allergen(s) this diet addresses

oaa:properties.name: crossContaminationStrict
oaa:properties.description: Whether cross-contamination avoidance is required (e.g. coeliac vs preference)

entities.name: MealTheme
entities.description: A curated collection of recipes grouped by dietary philosophy, season, cuisine, or wellness goal. Themes drive meal plan generation and recipe discovery.

oaa:properties.name: themeId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this theme

oaa:properties.name: themeName
oaa:properties.description: Human-readable theme name (e.g. High Protein, Mediterranean, Spring Fresh)

oaa:properties.name: themeType
oaa:properties.description: Classification of the theme type

oaa:properties.name: description
oaa:properties.description: Description of the theme and its nutritional philosophy

oaa:properties.name: filterCriteria
oaa:properties.description: JSON filter criteria for recipe matching

oaa:properties.name: isActive
oaa:properties.description: Whether this theme is currently available for selection

entities.name: SeasonalTheme
entities.description: Theme tied to UK seasonal produce availability: spring, summer, autumn, winter.

oaa:properties.name: season
oaa:properties.description: Season this theme targets

oaa:properties.name: seasonalMonths
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated month numbers when this season's produce peaks (e.g. 3,4,5 for spring)

entities.name: CuisineTheme
entities.description: Theme by cuisine tradition: British Comfort, Mediterranean, Asian Fusion, Middle Eastern, Latin American.

oaa:properties.name: cuisineName
oaa:properties.description: Name of the cuisine tradition

oaa:properties.name: typicalIngredients
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated list of typical ingredients for this cuisine

entities.name: GoalTheme
entities.description: Theme aligned to a fitness or health goal: High Protein, Low Carb, Anti-Inflammatory, Gut Health, Energy Boost.

oaa:properties.name: nutritionFocus
oaa:properties.description: Primary nutritional focus of this theme (e.g. high protein, low carb, anti-inflammatory)

oaa:properties.name: minimumProteinPerServing
oaa:properties.description: Minimum protein grams per serving for recipes in this theme

oaa:properties.name: maximumCarbsPerServing
oaa:properties.description: Maximum carbohydrate grams per serving for recipes in this theme

entities.name: LifestyleTheme
entities.description: Theme by lifestyle pattern: Quick Weeknight, Batch Cook Sunday, Budget Friendly, Family Meals, Desk Lunch.

oaa:properties.name: maxPrepTimeMinutes
oaa:properties.description: Maximum total recipe time in minutes for this theme

oaa:properties.name: maxCostPerServing
oaa:properties.description: Maximum cost per serving in GBP for budget themes

oaa:properties.name: familyFriendly
oaa:properties.description: Whether recipes in this theme are suitable for family cooking

entities.name: ClinicalTheme
entities.description: Coach-curated theme for medical conditions: Diabetic Friendly, PCOS Support, IBS Low-FODMAP, Thyroid Support.

oaa:properties.name: targetCondition
oaa:properties.description: Medical condition this theme supports

oaa:properties.name: evidenceBased
oaa:properties.description: Whether this theme is backed by clinical evidence

oaa:properties.name: requiresCoachApproval
oaa:properties.description: Whether selecting this theme requires coach approval

entities.name: Coach
entities.description: A clinical nutrition coach who manages clients, approves AI-generated meal plans, and authors evidence-based protocols for the RAG knowledge base.

oaa:properties.name: coachId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this coach

oaa:properties.name: name
oaa:properties.description: Coach full name

oaa:properties.name: qualifications
oaa:properties.description: Professional qualifications (e.g. BSc Nutrition, ANutr, RD)

oaa:properties.name: specialisms
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated areas of specialism (e.g. diabetes, sports nutrition, eating disorders)

oaa:properties.name: maxCaseload
oaa:properties.description: Maximum number of active clients this coach can manage

oaa:properties.name: currentCaseload
oaa:properties.description: Current number of active clients

oaa:properties.name: coachStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current availability status

entities.name: Protocol
entities.description: An evidence-based nutrition protocol authored by a coach, used by AI agents via RAG for meal plan generation and client recommendations.

oaa:properties.name: protocolId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this protocol

oaa:properties.name: name
oaa:properties.description: Protocol name (e.g. Type 2 Diabetes Nutrition Protocol v2)

oaa:properties.name: targetCondition
oaa:properties.description: Medical condition this protocol addresses

oaa:properties.name: targetGoal
oaa:properties.description: Goal type this protocol supports

oaa:properties.name: version
oaa:properties.description: Protocol version number

oaa:properties.name: datePublished
oaa:properties.description: Date the protocol was published

oaa:properties.name: evidenceReferences
oaa:properties.description: Comma-separated clinical evidence references supporting this protocol

oaa:properties.name: protocolStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current lifecycle status of the protocol

entities.name: MealPlanGenerationFlow
entities.description: The AI-driven process flow from client profile assembly through recipe search, plan generation, nutrition calculation, shopping list creation, coach review, to client delivery.

oaa:properties.name: flowId
oaa:properties.description: Unique identifier for this flow instance

oaa:properties.name: flowStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current step status in the generation flow

oaa:properties.name: initiatedDate
oaa:properties.description: Date and time the flow was triggered

oaa:properties.name: completedDate
oaa:properties.description: Date and time the flow completed

oaa:properties.name: triggerType
oaa:properties.description: What triggered this flow execution

entities.name: ProcessStep
entities.description: A single step within the MealPlanGenerationFlow. Maps to a specific agent or tool action in the AI pipeline.

oaa:properties.name: stepNumber
oaa:properties.description: Sequential step number within the flow

oaa:properties.name: action
oaa:properties.description: Description of the action performed at this step

oaa:properties.name: agentOrTool
oaa:properties.description: Name of the AI agent or tool responsible for this step

oaa:properties.name: stepStatus
oaa:properties.description: Current status of this step

oaa:properties.name: durationMs
oaa:properties.description: Execution duration in milliseconds

oaa:properties.name: errorMessage
oaa:properties.description: Error message if step failed

relationships.name: Contains Ingredient
relationships.description: Recipe contains this ingredient with specified quantity

relationships.name: Has Nutrition
relationships.description: Recipe has this per-serving nutrition profile

relationships.name: Has Instruction
relationships.description: Recipe has this preparation step

relationships.name: Suitable For Diet Type
relationships.description: Recipe is suitable for this dietary pattern

relationships.name: Excludes Allergen
relationships.description: Recipe is confirmed free from this allergen

relationships.name: Belongs To Theme
relationships.description: Recipe is curated into this meal theme collection

relationships.name: Substitutable With
relationships.description: Ingredient can be substituted with this alternative

relationships.name: Contains Meal Plan Day
relationships.description: Meal plan contains this daily plan

relationships.name: Contains Meal
relationships.description: Meal plan day contains this meal slot

relationships.name: Contains Recipe
relationships.description: Meal slot references this recipe

relationships.name: Has Daily Totals
relationships.description: Meal plan day has this aggregated nutrition totals

relationships.name: Has Weekly Totals
relationships.description: Meal plan has this aggregated weekly nutrition totals

relationships.name: Has Shopping List
relationships.description: Meal plan has this consolidated shopping list

relationships.name: Has Meal Prep Guide
relationships.description: Meal plan has this batch cooking and prep guide

relationships.name: Assigned To Client
relationships.description: Meal plan is assigned to this client

relationships.name: Approved By Coach
relationships.description: Meal plan was approved by this coach

relationships.name: Derived From Theme
relationships.description: Meal plan was generated using this theme as a primary curation driver

relationships.name: Targets Goal
relationships.description: Meal plan or theme targets this client goal

relationships.name: Has Profile
relationships.description: Client has this health profile

relationships.name: Has Goal
relationships.description: Client has this active nutrition goal

relationships.name: Has Macro Target
relationships.description: Client has this active daily macro target

relationships.name: Follows Diet
relationships.description: Client follows this dietary pattern

relationships.name: Has Allergen
relationships.description: Client has this declared allergen

relationships.name: Has Condition
relationships.description: Client has this diagnosed medical condition affecting nutrition planning

relationships.name: Has Dietary Restriction
relationships.description: Client has this dietary restriction applied

relationships.name: Prefers Theme
relationships.description: Client prefers this meal theme for plan curation

relationships.name: Coached By
relationships.description: Client is coached by this nutrition coach

relationships.name: Has Progress Log
relationships.description: Client has this progress tracking log entry

relationships.name: Manages
relationships.description: Coach manages this client in their caseload (inverse of coachedBy)

relationships.name: Authors
relationships.description: Coach authored this evidence-based protocol

relationships.name: Has Process Step
relationships.description: Meal plan generation flow contains this process step

relationships.name: Client Maps To Customer Role
relationships.description: NUT-ONT client maps to a CRT-ONT customer role for cross-ontology customer segmentation

relationships.name: Client Maps To Individual
relationships.description: NUT-ONT client maps to an IND-ONT individual for cross-ontology identity resolution

relationships.name: Coach Maps To Role
relationships.description: NUT-ONT coach maps to an RRR-ONT functional role for cross-ontology role governance

relationships.name: Flow Maps To Process
relationships.description: Meal plan generation flow maps to a PE-ONT process definition for cross-ontology process governance

relationships.name: Goal Maps To Benefit
relationships.description: NUT-ONT client goal maps to a VP-ONT benefit for cross-ontology value proposition alignment

relationships.name: Macro Target Maps To KPI
relationships.description: NUT-ONT macro target maps to a KPI-ONT KPI for cross-ontology performance measurement

relationships.name: Progress Maps To Measurement
relationships.description: NUT-ONT progress log maps to a KPI-ONT measurement for cross-ontology outcome tracking

businessRules.name: ClientHeightRequired
businessRules.condition: IF Client.heightCm IS NULL OR Client.heightCm <= 0
businessRules.action: THEN BLOCK meal plan generation — height is required for TDEE and BMI calculation

businessRules.name: MinimumCalorieFloor
businessRules.condition: IF Client.gender = female AND MacroTarget.dailyCalories < 1200 OR Client.gender = male AND MacroTarget.dailyCalories < 1500
businessRules.action: THEN BLOCK plan generation — calorie target is dangerously low and requires clinical override

businessRules.name: MacroCalorieConsistency
businessRules.condition: IF (MacroTarget.proteinGrams * 4) + (MacroTarget.carbsGrams * 4) + (MacroTarget.fatGrams * 9) differs from MacroTarget.dailyCalories by more than 5%
businessRules.action: THEN WARN — macro gram targets do not sum to the stated calorie target within tolerance

businessRules.name: MutuallyExclusiveDiets
businessRules.condition: IF Client.followsDiet contains mutually exclusive diet combinations (e.g. vegan AND carnivore, halal AND pork-inclusive, kosher AND shellfish-included)
businessRules.action: THEN BLOCK — conflicting dietary patterns cannot be simultaneously active

businessRules.name: GoalRequired
businessRules.condition: IF Client.hasGoal IS NULL (no goal assigned)
businessRules.action: THEN BLOCK meal plan generation — a goal is required to determine macro targets and theme selection

businessRules.name: MedicalConditionICD10
businessRules.action: THEN WARN — medical conditions should have ICD-10 codes for clinical interoperability

businessRules.name: AllergenSafetyCheck
businessRules.condition: IF Recipe.excludesAllergen does NOT contain ALL allergens declared in Client.hasAllergen
businessRules.action: THEN the recipe is UNSAFE for this client and MUST NOT be included in their meal plan

businessRules.name: MinimumRecipePool
businessRules.condition: IF the number of matching recipes after allergen, diet, and theme filtering is less than 15
businessRules.action: THEN WARN — recipe pool is too small for variety; expand with generated or substituted recipes

businessRules.name: RecipeRepetitionLimit
businessRules.condition: IF the same recipe is used more than 2 times in a 7-day meal plan
businessRules.action: THEN WARN — recipe variety violation; aim for maximum 2 repetitions per recipe per week

businessRules.name: ProteinSourceVariety
businessRules.condition: IF fewer than 4 distinct protein sources are used across a 7-day meal plan
businessRules.action: THEN WARN — protein source variety violation; diversify protein across the week

businessRules.name: DailyCalorieVariance
businessRules.condition: IF DailyTotals.calorieVariancePercent exceeds 10% from MacroTarget.dailyCalories on any single day
businessRules.action: THEN WARN — daily calorie variance exceeds acceptable threshold

businessRules.name: WeeklyAverageVariance
businessRules.action: THEN WARN — weekly average calorie variance exceeds acceptable threshold

businessRules.name: MonthlyAverageVariance
businessRules.condition: IF 30-day rolling average calorie variance exceeds 3% from MacroTarget.dailyCalories
businessRules.action: THEN BLOCK — sustained calorie drift requires macro target review with coach

businessRules.name: AllergenViolationBlocksApproval
businessRules.condition: IF allergen violation count > 0 in a generated meal plan (any recipe contains a client-declared allergen)
businessRules.action: THEN BLOCK plan approval — zero-tolerance allergen safety policy

businessRules.name: WeightUnitConversion
businessRules.condition: IF Client.weight is provided in stones or pounds (non-metric input)
businessRules.action: THEN convert to kilograms automatically AND WARN the client that metric units are used internally

businessRules.name: CuisineVariety
businessRules.condition: IF more than 2 consecutive days in a meal plan feature the same cuisine type
businessRules.action: THEN WARN — cuisine variety violation; rotate cuisine themes across the week

changeControl.author: PF-Core
changes: Initial release - 39 entities, 38 relationships, 16 business rules, 7 join patterns, 18 competency questions
Converted from VHF-Recipe-MealPlan-Ontology v1.0.0 (jsonld) to OAA v7.0.0 format
39 entities across 7 groups: Recipe (5), Meal Planning (9), Client (8), Diet (7), Theme (6), Coaching (2), Process (2)
7 cross-ontology relationships bridging to PE-ONT, CRT-ONT, IND-ONT, RRR-ONT, VP-ONT, KPI-ONT
Schema.org dual-typing: Recipe, NutritionProfile, Client (Patient), Coach (Person), MedicalCondition, DietType (RestrictedDiet)
UK-specific: 14 major allergens (Food Information Regulations 2014), UK supermarket aisle grouping, seasonal UK produce
Diet type taxonomy: 6 categories (Ethical, Religious, Medical, Macronutrient, Lifestyle, AllergenFree) with 26+ named diets
Theme system: 5 theme types (Goal, Cuisine, Seasonal, Lifestyle, Clinical) driving AI meal plan curation
8-step AI meal plan generation flow: context assembly -> theme resolution -> recipe search -> plan generation -> totals -> shopping list -> coach review -> delivery
Designed for B2C clinical nutrition coaching platforms (VHF instance) but generalisable to any nutrition/meal planning domain

competencyQuestions.question: Which recipes are safe for a client with specific allergens and diet types, after applying all constraint filters?
What is the 7-day and 30-day macro variance for a generated meal plan compared to the client's macro targets?
Which clients have conflicting or mutually exclusive diet combinations that need resolution?
What is the complete client-to-recipe traversal path for a given meal plan, including all intermediate entities?
Which themes align with a client's active goal, and which recipes belong to those themes?
What is the consolidated shopping list for a meal plan, grouped by supermarket aisle with UK availability status?
Which clients does a given coach manage, what plans are pending approval, and what protocols has the coach authored?
Are any clients' calorie targets below the minimum safe floor (1200 female / 1500 male)?
Which clients are missing required profile data (height, weight, goal) that blocks plan generation?
Which medical conditions in the client base lack ICD-10 codes?
What ingredient substitutions are available for a recipe to accommodate a specific allergen or dietary restriction?
Does a generated meal plan have sufficient recipe variety (fewer than 2 repeats) and protein source diversity (at least 4 sources)?
Do a client's macro gram targets (protein*4 + carbs*4 + fat*9) match the stated calorie target within 5% tolerance?
What is the recipe pool size after applying all client constraints, and is it above the minimum threshold of 15?
What is the status of the meal plan generation flow for a given client, and which step is currently executing?
How does a client's nutrition goal map to VP-ONT benefits for value proposition reporting?
What is a client's progress trajectory over the last 30 days (weight trend, adherence, energy levels)?
Does a meal plan violate cuisine variety rules (more than 2 consecutive days with the same cuisine)?
